name: Pineapple Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the diced pineapple, minced garlic, minced mint, lime juice, salt, and cumin.
2. Add cayenne pepper to taste.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. The salsa will keep in the refrigerator for several days.
